Popups for Bluetooth heart rate monitor sharing, reminders, and stopping actions with user interactions.


## Files
- **[ble_hrm_reminder_popup.c](ble_hrm_reminder_popup.c.md)**: Implements a popup reminder for heart rate sharing with actions to dismiss or stop sharing.
- **[ble_hrm_reminder_popup.h](ble_hrm_reminder_popup.h.md)**: Function declaration for pushing a BLE heart rate monitor reminder popup.
- **[ble_hrm_sharing_popup.c](ble_hrm_sharing_popup.c.md)**: Implements a Bluetooth heart rate monitor sharing request popup with user interaction handling.
- **[ble_hrm_sharing_popup.h](ble_hrm_sharing_popup.h.md)**: Header file for handling BLE heart rate monitor sharing requests in the Pebble firmware.
- **[ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup.c](ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup.c.md)**: Creates a simple dialog to confirm the stopping of heart rate sharing with a timeout setting.
- **[ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup.h](ble_hrm_stop_sharing_popup.h.md)**: Creates a SimpleDialog for stopping BLE heart rate monitor sharing.
